action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 9 eval achieved mean_r2=0.5206 (new best) with the 42M-param ResMLP after 10 epochs. Validation loss was still declining (0.003341) and ptend_q remains the weakest group (0.3176), indicating underfitting. Analysis: The model has capacity but needs more training time. We have ~3.16 hours and 21 iterations left. Training 10 epochs took ~26 min, so 20 more epochs (to 30 total) should take ~50 min and is well within budget. I will resume from checkpoints/resmlp.pt, add AMP for speed, and re-anneal LR from the base rate over the remaining epochs. Decision: Rewrite train.py with AMP autocast, resume support, and robust metric logging. Train for epochs 11-30 and submit eval immediately after training.
